news.t: Amazon stock hits record, lights up ETFs
Tesla juices consumer discretionary ETFs on stock split plan
The Tell: These ETFs are ready for Amazon’s Prime time
FANG ETFs outperform as CEOs face Congress
Amazon-heavy ETFs deliver losses one day after on-line retailer offers uncertain outlook
Tech ETFs roar higher as end of bear market beckons
It’s hard for shoppers to avoid Amazon — even in their ETFs

holdings.infoBox: FDIS is an equity ETF with a total of 251 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 20.28%, Tesla at 16.83%, The Home Depot at 4.79%, McDonald's at 2.99%, and The TJX Companies at 2.74%.

overview.description: The Fidelity MSCI Consumer Discretionary Index ETF (FDIS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of stocks in the US consumer discretionary sector. FDIS was launched on Oct 21, 2013 and is issued by Fidelity.
infoTable: MSCI USA IMI Consumer Discretionary 25/50 Index

data.title: Amazon stock hits record, lights up ETFs
data.text: Amazon's cloud business knocked it out of the park and CEO Andy Jassy hinted that the unit is gaining momentum heading into the next few months giving him 'significant confidence' he said.

data.title: Tesla juices consumer discretionary ETFs on stock split plan
data.text: Tesla electrified a basket of consumer exchange-traded funds with its plans for another stock split and potential dividend.

data.title: The Tell: These ETFs are ready for Amazon’s Prime time
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to shares of Amazon.com could get a boost from its Prime Day event, but Amazon is such a unique company that it defies easy categorization.

data.title: FANG ETFs outperform as CEOs face Congress
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with heavy exposure to tech giants outperformed Wednesday even as the companies faced questioning on Capitol Hill. Shares of Amazon.com Inc.

data.title: Amazon-heavy ETFs deliver losses one day after on-line retailer offers uncertain outlook
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with heavy exposure to Amazon.com Inc. AMZN, -8.63% slumped Friday after the retailer reported a blowout quarter for revenues, but said it would continue to reinvest profits in s...

data.title: Consumer discretionary ETFs outperform Friday
data.text: Exchange-traded funds tracking the consumer discretionary sector were trading higher at midday Friday.

data.title: Tech ETFs roar higher as end of bear market beckons
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to internet technology stocks surged Tuesday on the heels of a broader bounce in tech.

data.title: It’s hard for shoppers to avoid Amazon — even in their ETFs
data.text: Amazon.com Inc. makes up an outsize share of the biggest consumer discretionary ETFs, a fact investors should keep in mind when researching such a trade.
